title: chloroxylon chloroxylon
intro: Chloroxylon chloroxylon, also known as East Indian sandalwood, is a large evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant's heartwood contains the valuable and aromatic resin, sandalwood oil, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The medicinal properties of East Indian sandalwood include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders. It can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and powders, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
